package rulecoverage

func PositiveGrpcWithoutTlsCredentials() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_without_tls_credentials"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`grpc.Dial(addr, grpc.WithInsecure())` or `grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials())` in non-test code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
